overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a female character walking around the Kaseya Center plaza in Miami on a bright sunny day. The character explores the empty urban plaza, passing modern arena architecture, palm trees, and large signage while the camera follows smoothly from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: front plaza of modern sports arena with large signage

events.description: character turns right and begins walking along the Kaseya Center facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the front of the arena building, exploring the open plaza

entered.detail: large curved white building with prominent KASEYA CENTER signage
tall modern glass office tower visible in the background
wide open concrete plaza surface with weathered textures
low-rise white modern structure extending from the main arena

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of the Kaseya Center's curved white facade dominating the frame. The character begins walking along the front plaza, with a tall glass skyscraper visible in the distant left background. The concrete plaza is empty and bathed in bright midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: side plaza with palm trees and painted ground markings

events.description: moving from front facade to side plaza area with scattered palm trees and pink painted ground markings

agents.ego_description: continuing along the plaza path, passing concrete barriers and approaching the side of the arena

entered.detail: low concrete wall with metal railings running along the building side
large black banner with white text reading Welcome to American Airlines Arena
scattered palm trees providing sparse shade along the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the side of the arena, passing low concrete retaining walls and scattered palm trees. Pink painted markings appear on the concrete ground. The American Airlines Arena banner becomes visible on the right as the main facade recedes into the left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved arena wing with large sponsorship banner

events.description: approaching the curved building section with the prominent American Airlines Arena signage becoming the focal point

agents.ego_description: walking toward the curved arena wing, passing a tall stone monolith structure on the right

entered.detail: rounded white architectural section of the arena with horizontal lines
large vertical stone sculpture or architectural element on the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the curved wing of the arena where the large American Airlines Arena banner is mounted. A tall stone monolith stands prominently on the right side of the path. The palm trees shift to the left as the character moves deeper into the plaza area, with the curved white architecture now dominating the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright urban plaza, transitioning from a wide view of the arena's facade to a closer exploration of its architectural wings. It begins with the curved white facade of the Kaseya Center dominating the frame as the character walks across an empty concrete plaza under midday sunlight, with a distant glass skyscraper visible to the left. As the character moves along the side of the arena, the main facade recedes into the background while low concrete walls, scattered palm trees, and pink ground markings come into view. The scene then shifts toward the curved wing of the building, passing a large American Airlines Arena banner on the right and a prominent stone monolith. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the plaza as the palm trees shift to the left and the white architecture once again envelops the field of view.
